# png

```go
import "image/png"
```

Package png implements a PNG image decoder and encoder.

The PNG specification is at https://www.w3.org/TR/PNG/.

<a name="Decode"></a>

## func [Decode](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/png/reader.go#L969>)

```go
func Decode(r io.Reader) (image.Image, error)
```

Decode reads a PNG image from r and returns it as an [image.Image](<https://pkg.go.dev/image/#Image>). The type of Image returned depends on the PNG contents.

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>

```go
package main

import (
	"encoding/base64"
	"fmt"
	"image/color"
	"image/png"
	"io"
	"log"
	"strings"
)

const gopher = ``

// gopherPNG creates an io.Reader by decoding the base64 encoded image data string in the gopher constant.
func gopherPNG() io.Reader { return base64.NewDecoder(base64.StdEncoding, strings.NewReader(gopher)) }

func main() {
	// This example uses png.Decode which can only decode PNG images.
	// Consider using the general image.Decode as it can sniff and decode any registered image format.
	img, err := png.Decode(gopherPNG())
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}

	levels := []string{" ", "░", "▒", "▓", "█"}

	for y := img.Bounds().Min.Y; y < img.Bounds().Max.Y; y++ {
		for x := img.Bounds().Min.X; x < img.Bounds().Max.X; x++ {
			c := color.GrayModel.Convert(img.At(x, y)).(color.Gray)
			level := c.Y / 51 // 51 * 5 = 255
			if level == 5 {
				level--
			}
			fmt.Print(levels[level])
		}
		fmt.Print("\n")
	}
}
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="DecodeConfig"></a>

## func [DecodeConfig](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/png/reader.go#L993>)

```go
func DecodeConfig(r io.Reader) (image.Config, error)
```

DecodeConfig returns the color model and dimensions of a PNG image without decoding the entire image.

<a name="Encode"></a>

## func [Encode](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/png/writer.go#L584>)

```go
func Encode(w io.Writer, m image.Image) error
```

Encode writes the Image m to w in PNG format. Any Image may be encoded, but images that are not [image.NRGBA](<https://pkg.go.dev/image/#NRGBA>) might be encoded lossily.

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>

```go
package main

import (
	"image"
	"image/color"
	"image/png"
	"log"
	"os"
)

func main() {
	const width, height = 256, 256

	// Create a colored image of the given width and height.
	img := image.NewNRGBA(image.Rect(0, 0, width, height))

	for y := 0; y < height; y++ {
		for x := 0; x < width; x++ {
			img.Set(x, y, color.NRGBA{
				R: uint8((x + y) & 255),
				G: uint8((x + y) << 1 & 255),
				B: uint8((x + y) << 2 & 255),
				A: 255,
			})
		}
	}

	f, err := os.Create("image.png")
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}

	if err := png.Encode(f, img); err != nil {
		f.Close()
		log.Fatal(err)
	}

	if err := f.Close(); err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
}
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="CompressionLevel"></a>

## type [CompressionLevel](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/png/writer.go#L55>)

CompressionLevel indicates the compression level.

```go
type CompressionLevel int
```

<a name="DefaultCompression"></a>

```go
const (
    DefaultCompression CompressionLevel = 0
    NoCompression      CompressionLevel = -1
    BestSpeed          CompressionLevel = -2
    BestCompression    CompressionLevel = -3
)
```

<a name="Encoder"></a>

## type [Encoder](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/png/writer.go#L19-L25>)

Encoder configures encoding PNG images.

```go
type Encoder struct {
    CompressionLevel CompressionLevel

    // BufferPool optionally specifies a buffer pool to get temporary
    // EncoderBuffers when encoding an image.
    BufferPool EncoderBufferPool
}
```

<a name="Encoder.Encode"></a>

### func \(\*Encoder\) [Encode](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/png/writer.go#L590>)

```go
func (enc *Encoder) Encode(w io.Writer, m image.Image) error
```

Encode writes the Image m to w in PNG format.

<a name="EncoderBuffer"></a>

## type [EncoderBuffer](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/png/writer.go#L36>)

EncoderBuffer holds the buffers used for encoding PNG images.

```go
type EncoderBuffer encoder
```

<a name="EncoderBufferPool"></a>

## type [EncoderBufferPool](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/png/writer.go#L30-L33>)

EncoderBufferPool is an interface for getting and returning temporary instances of the [EncoderBuffer](<#EncoderBuffer>) struct. This can be used to reuse buffers when encoding multiple images.

```go
type EncoderBufferPool interface {
    Get() *EncoderBuffer
    Put(*EncoderBuffer)
}
```

```go
type FormatError string
```
